creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
On recent CURRENT, FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #6 main-n250822-4fdc5b8494b4: Thu Nov 18 06:00:15 CET 2021 amd64, compiling port devel/vc-intrinsics@llvm12 (and devel/vc-intrinsics@llvm11) fails to build due to:

[...]
FAILED: GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/CMakeFiles/LLVMGenXIntrinsics.dir/GenXIntrinsics.cpp.o 
/usr/bin/c++ -DVC_INTR_LLVM_VERSION_MAJOR=12 -D__STDC_CONSTANT_MACROS -D__STDC_FORMAT_MACROS -D__STDC_LIMIT_MACROS -I/usr/local/llvm12/include -I/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/include -I/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/.build/GenXIntrinsics/include -I/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/.build/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/../../include -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -Werror=date-time -Werror=unguarded-availability-new -Wall -Wextra -Wno-unused-parameter -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wmissing-field-initializers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wcovered-switch-default -Wno-noexcept-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wdelete-non-virtual-dtor -Wsuggest-override -Wstring-conversion -fdiagnostics-color -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -O2 -pipe -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -fno-exceptions -std=gnu++14 -MD -MT GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/CMakeFiles/LLVMGenXIntrinsics.dir/GenXIntrinsics.cpp.o -MF GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/CMakeFiles/LLVMGenXIntrinsics.dir/GenXIntrinsics.cpp.o.d -o GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/CMakeFiles/LLVMGenXIntrinsics.dir/GenXIntrinsics.cpp.o -c /usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/GenXIntrinsics.cpp
/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/GenXIntrinsics.cpp:687:16: error: no type named 'LSCVectorSize' in namespace 'llvm::GenXIntrinsic'
GenXIntrinsic::LSCVectorSize GenXIntrinsic::getLSCVectorSize(
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^
/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/GenXIntrinsics.cpp:689:10: error: use of undeclared identifier 'isLSC'
  assert(isLSC(I));
         ^
/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/GenXIntrinsics.cpp:690:11: error: use of undeclared identifier 'getLSCCategory'
  switch (getLSCCategory(I)) {
          ^
/usr/ports/devel/vc-intrinsics/work-llvm12/vc-intrinsics-8ee8793/GenXIntrinsics/lib/GenXIntrinsics/GenXIntrinsics.cpp:691:10: error: use of undeclared identifier 'LSCCategory'
    case LSCCategory::Load:
